title: Command Sticks
description: Command stick items that execute commands with a simple right-click.
body:
**Welcome to Command Sticks!** This is a very simple Creative Utility mod. The main focus is the Command Stick. A command stick just executes the command that you enter into the GUI.

**Steps:**

    Run "/give @s command_sticks:command_stick" in chat, or "/give @p command_sticks:command_stick" from a command block. The command stick is also availible in the Operator Items tab of the creative inventory.
    Hold Sneak + Right Click on the Command Stick to open up the Command Stick GUI.
    Enter whatever command you want to run into the text box, then click "OK".
    Now, just right-click your Command Stick to execute the command!

 

I hope this mod helps make your Minecrafting a little more fun and less tedious. Have fun!

 

**FYI:** Holding down a Command Stick does not run the command multiple times. you will need to click each time to run the command. I plan on adding Repeating Command Sticks in the future.

**FYI 2:** As of version 1.0.0, all command sticks share a universal command to run. I plan on adding individual commands for each item in the future.

 

Please keep in mind that this mod is a work in progress. Current version support:
- 1.21.1 NeoForge

 

**Create a Minecraft server with Bisect Hosting with my Command Stick Mod! From using this link, you'll get 25% off your first purchase, and support future development!**
Please keep in mind that this affiliation link downloads the Curseforge version.

https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/vDufm

Note: This is not an ad-shortener.

If you'd like to download this mod on Curseforge instead, you can do so here:
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/command-sticks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/command-sticks)
I recommend you download from Modrinth, but it's your choice which website you like better.

Thanks for downloading Command Sticks!
